payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new for Sam from Goldman because mem_new is the current applicable memory. mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded, so it should not appear as a current fact.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current non-superseded memory for Sam from Goldman; mem_old was filtered because it is marked as superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The query context identifies Sam from Goldman; no durable entity identifier was provided in the fixture.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new is the active/current memory associated with Sam from Goldman.
mem_old was excluded from recall because it is superseded by mem_new.

details: Explained why mem_old was filtered as superseded.
Did not present the superseded memory as current.
